form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Taree Super Track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when eighth (29.66) at this track. Looks a definite winning chance on best and given another chance.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 2 over 380m at this track behind Reckless Ruby beaten 8 lengths (22.57) in a Restricted WIN. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 13 length seventh over 380m at this track. Safely held last time and looking to others.
